# UC-12.1.22 · GitLab Runner Docker Machine / Autoscaler Provisioning Errors

## Description

Provisioning errors starve CI capacity and lengthen queue times across teams sharing runners.

## Value

Identifies runner pools that cannot spawn executors so jobs backlog before developers notice queue SLA breaches.

## Implementation

Collect `/var/log/gitlab-runner.log` or container stdout; extract runner identity and error strings. Correlate with cloud quota and image pull errors.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="gitlab:runner" OR sourcetype="gitlab:pipeline"
| search "machine creation" OR "autoscaler" OR "Failed to create" OR "docker-machine"
| stats count by runner_token_fingerprint, runner_host, coalesce(project_path, "unknown")
| where count >= 5
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Line chart (errors over time), Table (runner × project_path).

## References

- [GitLab Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/6848)
- [GitLab CI/CD logs to Splunk (Lantern)](https://lantern.splunk.com/Data_Descriptors/GitLab/Getting_Gitlab_CICD_data_out_of_a_Gitlab_Pipeline_into_Splunk)
